gates.name: Workflow syntax and triggers
gates.evidence: push → main + workflow_dispatch, permissions: contents:read, concurrency group, 3 jobs

gates.name: SSH configuration
gates.evidence: 3 secrets used, ssh-keyscan, temp key, no StrictHostKeyChecking=no, no key exposure

gates.name: Release packaging
gates.evidence: tar czf with exclusions, release ID = run_number-sha, 0 secrets in package

gates.name: Docker build
gates.evidence: Frontend build PASS (157 modules, 402KB), Backend build PASS (97 packages, 0 vulns)

gates.name: PostgreSQL configuration
gates.evidence: Persistent volume pgdata_production, no public port, 17 migrations automated, 5 seeds idempotent

gates.name: Environment configuration
gates.evidence: .env.production.example created with 18 real vars, /opt/siged-lampa/shared/.env.production expected on EC2

gates.name: Health and smoke tests
gates.evidence: Health checks for postgres/backend/frontend, 5 smoke tests, failure stops workflow

gates.name: Rollback capability
gates.evidence: Automated on failure (previous release restored + health verified), backup pg_dump before migration

gates.name: Security
gates.evidence: 0 secrets committed, non-root backend user, postgres private, workflow permissions minimal

gates.name: Documentation
gates.evidence: 5 docs complete (DEPLOYMENT, SECRETS, EC2_SETUP, ROLLBACK, RUNBOOK)
